_publications._publicationTitle: Local low-dose lovastatin delivery improves the bone-healing defect caused by Nf1 loss of function in osteoblasts.

_contextSnippet: Lovastatin treatment (20 µM for 12 hours) consistently decreased ERK1/2 activation in Nf1−/− osteoblasts compared with vehicle-treated controls.
details: Lovastatin treatment (20 µM for 12 hours) consistently decreased ERK1/2 activation in Nf1−/− osteoblasts
